Name: Potion
Description: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

Name: X Speed
Description: During this turn, the Retreat Cost of your Active Pokémon is 1 less.

Name: Pokedex
Description: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck.

Name: Poke Ball
Description: Put 1 random Basic Pokemon from your deck into your hand.

Name: Red Card
Description: Your opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 3 cards.

Name: Pokedex
Description: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck.

Name: Pikachu
Flavor-Text: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

Name: Mewtwo
Effects: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA-engineering experiments.

Name: Chansey
Flavor-Text: This kindly Pokémon lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.

Name: Meowth
Effects: Draw 1 card.
Flavor-Text: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

Name: Butterfree
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: In battle, it flaps its wings at great speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

Name: Lapras ex
Effects: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

Name: Pikachu
Flavor-Text: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

Name: Clefairy
Flavor-Text: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

Name: Mankey
Effects: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.
Flavor-Text: It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness.

Name: Venusaur
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Its plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

Name: Greninja
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may do 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water.  When it spins them and throws them at high speed,  these stars can split metal in two.

Name: Haunter
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
Flavor-Text: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.

Name: Onix
Flavor-Text: As it digs through the ground, it absorbs many hard objects. This is what makes its body so solid.

Name: Jigglypuff
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
Flavor-Text: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

Name: Bulbasaur
Flavor-Text: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

Name: Magnemite
Flavor-Text: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

Name: Moltres ex
Effects: Flip 3 coins. Take an amount of [R] Energy from your Energy Zone equal to the number of heads and attach it to your Benched [R] Pokémon in any way you like.

Name: Pikachu
Flavor-Text: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

Name: Snivy
Flavor-Text: Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.

Name: Volcarona
Effects: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Its burning body causes it to be unpopular in hot parts of the world, but in cold ones, Volcarona is revered as an embodiment of the sun.

Name: Blastoise
Effects: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.
Flavor-Text: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

Name: Eevee
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do −20 damage.
Flavor-Text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

Name: Cinccino
Effects: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Its body secretes oil that this Pokémon spreads over its nest as a coating to protect it from dust. Cinccino won’t tolerate even a speck of the stuff.

Name: Charmander
Effects: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

Name: Squirtle
Flavor-Text: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

Name: Piplup
Effects: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It doesn’t like to be taken care of. It’s difficult to bond with since it won’t listen to its Trainer.

Name: Turtwig
Flavor-Text: It uses its whole body to photosynthesize when exposed to sunlight. Its shell is made from hardened soil.

Name: Electivire
Effects: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [L] Energy attached, this attack does 80 more damage.
Flavor-Text: The amount of electrical energy this Pokémon produces is proportional to the rate of its pulse. The voltage jumps while Electivire is battling.

Name: Cresselia
Ability-Effect: Whenever you attach a [P] Energy from your Energy Zone to this Pokémon, heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

Name: Misdreavus
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
Flavor-Text: This Pokémon startles people in the middle of the night. It gathers fear as its energy.

Name: Skarmory
Effects: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 30 more damage.
Flavor-Text: People fashion swords from Skarmory’s shed feathers, so this Pokémon is a popular element in heraldic designs.

Name: Chimchar
Flavor-Text: Its fiery rear end is fueled by gas made in its belly. Even rain can’t extinguish the fire.

Name: Togepi
Flavor-Text: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

Name: Darkrai ex
Ability-Effect: Whenever you attach a [D] Energy from your Energy Zone to this Pokémon, do 20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Name: Cherrim
Effects: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: After absorbing plenty of sunlight, Cherrim takes this form. It’s full of energy while it’s like this, and its liveliness will go on until sundown.

Name: Raichu
Ability-Effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.
Effects: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

Name: Nosepass
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.
Flavor-Text: It moves less than an inch a year, but when it’s in a jam, it will spin and drill down into the ground in a split second.

Name: Gible
Flavor-Text: It skulks in caves, and when prey or an enemy passes by, it leaps out and chomps them. The force of its attack sometimes chips its teeth.

Name: Staraptor
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks from [F] Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: When Staravia evolve into Staraptor, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings.

Name: Manaphy
Effects: Choose 2 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to that Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

Name: Snorlax
Effects: This Pokémon is now Asleep.
Flavor-Text: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

Name: Mewtwo ex
Effects: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.

Name: Cyclizar
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overacceleration attack does +20 damage.
Flavor-Text: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

Name: Sprigatito
Effects: Put 1 random [G] Pokémon from your deck into your hand.
Flavor-Text: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.

Name: Floatzel
Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 60 more damage.
Flavor-Text: With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.

Name: Pawmot
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.

Name: Machamp
Effects: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [F] Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.
Flavor-Text: It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

Name: Ekans
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.
Flavor-Text: By dislocating its jaw, it can swallow prey larger than itself. After a meal, it curls up and rests.

Name: Bidoof
Flavor-Text: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

Name: Pachirisu
Effects: Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched [L] Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It’s one of the kinds of Pokémon with electric cheek pouches. It shoots charges from its tail.

Name: Riolu
Flavor-Text: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

Name: Exeggcute
Effects: Take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Though it may look like it’s just a bunch of eggs, it’s a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.

Name: Froakie
Flavor-Text: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

Name: Farfetch'd
Flavor-Text: The stalk this Pokémon carries in its wings serves as a sword to cut down opponents. In a dire situation, the stalk can also serve as food.

Name: Rayquaza
Effects: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.
Flavor-Text: It lives in the ozone layer far above the clouds and cannot be seen from the ground.

Name: Rayquaza ex
Effects: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random 4 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

Name: Rayquaza ex
Effects: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random 4 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

Name: Mimikyu
Effects: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

Name: Cosmog
Effects: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Even though its helpless, gaseous body can be blown away by the slightest breeze, it doesn’t seem to care.

Name: Lycanroc
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Lycanroc attacks its prey with its sharp claws and fangs. It loyally obeys the instructions of a Trainer it trusts.

Name: Alolan Exeggutor
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
Flavor-Text: Blazing sunlight has brought out the true form and powers of this Pokémon.

Name: Alolan Ninetales
Effects: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: A deity resides in the snowy mountains where this Pokémon lives. In ancient times, it was worshiped as that deity’s incarnation.

Name: Crabrawler
Flavor-Text: This Pokémon punches trees and eats the berries that drop down, training itself and getting food at the same time.

Name: Alolan Grimer
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.
Flavor-Text: There are a hundred or so of them living in Alola’s waste-disposal site. They’re all hard workers who eat a lot of trash.

Name: Toucannon
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.
Flavor-Text: They smack beaks with others of their kind to communicate. The strength and number of hits tell each other how they feel.

Name: Zeraora
Ability-Effect: At the end of your first turn, take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.

Name: Kartana
Flavor-Text: This Ultra Beast’s body, which is as thin as paper, is like a sharpened sword.

Name: Blacephalon
Effects: This Pokémon also does 70 damage to itself.
Flavor-Text: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.

Name: Xurkitree
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
Flavor-Text: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

Name: Dawn Wings Necrozma
Effects: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
Flavor-Text: Lunala no longer has a will of its own. Now under the control of Necrozma, it continuously expels all of its energy.

Name: Dusk Mane Necrozma
Effects: Discard a [M] Energy from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: This is its form while it is devouring the light of Solgaleo. It pounces on foes and then slashes them with the claws on its four limbs and back.

Name: Stakataka
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.
Flavor-Text: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.

Name: Ultra Necrozma ex
Effects: Discard the top 5 cards of each player's deck.

Name: Poipole
Effects: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
Flavor-Text: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

Name: Stufful
Flavor-Text: Its fluffy fur is a delight to pet, but carelessly reaching out to touch this Pokémon could result in painful retaliation.

Name: Tapu Koko ex
Effects: Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

Name: Vanillite
Effects: If 1 of your Pokémon used Sweets Relay during your last turn, this attack does 20 more damage.
Flavor-Text: Unable to survive in hot areas, it makes itself comfortable by breathing out air cold enough to cause snow. It burrows into the snow to sleep.

Name: Jolteon
Effects: If this Pokémon evolved during this turn, this attack does 20 more damage.
Flavor-Text: It concentrates the weak electric charges emitted by its cells and launches wicked lightning bolts.

Name: Alcremie
Effects: This attack does 40 damage for each time your Pokémon used Sweets Relay during this game.
Flavor-Text: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.

Name: Dragonair
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.

Name: Audino
Effects: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: This Pokémon has a kind heart. By touching with its feelers, Audino can gauge other creatures’ feelings and physical conditions.

Name: Togedemaru
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack, do 30 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: With the long hairs on its back, this Pokémon takes in electricity from other electric Pokémon. It stores what it absorbs in an electric sac.

Name: Greedent
Effects: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 50 more damage.
Flavor-Text: This Pokémon makes off with heaps of fallen berries by wrapping them in its tail, which is roughly twice the length of its body.

Name: Eevee
Flavor-Text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

Name: Cleffa
Effects: Put a random Pokémon from your deck into your hand.
Flavor-Text: According to local rumors, Cleffa are often seen in places where shooting stars have fallen.

Name: Horsea
Effects: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Horsea makes its home in oceans with gentle currents. If this Pokémon is under attack, it spits out pitch-black ink and escapes.

Name: Chinchou
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.
Flavor-Text: Its antennae, which evolved from a fin, have both positive and negative charges flowing through them.

Name: Houndoom
Effects: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.
Flavor-Text: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

Name: Kangaskhan
Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage.
Flavor-Text: Although it’s carrying its baby in a pouch on its belly, Kangaskhan is swift on its feet. It intimidates its opponents with quick jabs.

Name: Blissey ex
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, heal 60 damage from this Pokémon.

Name: Marill
Flavor-Text: The fur on its body naturally repels water. It can stay dry even when it plays in the water.

Name: Weavile
Flavor-Text: Evolution made it even more devious. It communicates by clawing signs in boulders.

Name: Latias
Effects: If Latios is on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.
Flavor-Text: It communicates using telepathy. Its body is covered in down that refracts light to make it invisible.

Name: Tropius
Effects: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.
Flavor-Text: It lives in tropical jungles. The bunch of fruit around its neck is delicious. The fruit grows twice a year.

Name: Poliwag
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
Flavor-Text: For Poliwag, swimming is easier than walking. The swirl pattern on its belly is actually part of the Pokémon’s innards showing through the skin.

Name: Milotic
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may heal 60 damage from 1 of your [W] Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Milotic has provided inspiration to many artists. It has even been referred to as the most beautiful Pokémon of all.

Name: Zorua
Flavor-Text: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

Name: Zoroark
Ability-Effect: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this Pokémon's attacks, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Stories say those who tried to catch Zoroark were trapped in an illusion and punished.

Name: Miltank
Effects: Until this Pokémon leaves the Active Spot, this Pokémon's Rolling Frenzy attack does +30 damage. This effect stacks.
Flavor-Text: Miltank produces highly nutritious milk, so it’s been supporting the lives of people and other Pokémon since ancient times.

Name: Phanpy
Effects: This attack does damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.
Flavor-Text: This Pokémon lives and nests on a riverbank. After playing in the mud, it won’t be able to settle down unless it washes its body.

Name: Eevee ex
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon can evolve into any Pokémon that evolves from Eevee if you play it from your hand onto this Pokémon. (This Pokémon can't evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.)

Name: Entei ex
Ability-Effect: At the end of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, draw a card.
Effects: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [R] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

Name: Pikachu
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
Flavor-Text: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

Name: Raichu ex
Effects: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

Name: Mimikyu
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.
Flavor-Text: This Pokémon lives in dark places untouched by sunlight. When it appears before humans, it hides itself under a cloth that resembles a Pikachu.

Name: Machamp
Effects: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.
Flavor-Text: It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

Name: Regigigas
Effects: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.
Flavor-Text: It is said to have made Pokémon that look like itself from a special ice mountain, rocks, and magma.

Name: Shaymin
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

Name: Absol
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Flavor-Text: Swift as the wind, Absol races through fields and mountains. Its curved, bow-like horn is acutely sensitive to the warning signs of natural disasters.
